name: Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
The tang of Dijon mustard and the smoothness of whipping cream combine with
the light flavor of champagne or white wine to make this a wonderful, easy
sauce for fish.
1. In a small saucepan over medium heat on the stove, combine the broth, anchovies, shallots, and mustard.
2. Bring to a boil and cook until the liquid reduces by about 1/3 and begins to thicken.
3. Add the cream and continue to cook until the mixture becomes saucelike and is thick enough to coat the back of a spoon.
4. Remove from the heat and whisk in the butter.
5. Serve immediately or keep warm in a water bath.
Makes 1 Cup
